task: Relay index cleanup pass after prompt_content fix
message: RIGSR Relay Intake routing tests have passed. --all PASS. --dead-letter PASS. Mailbox routes validated for 00, 03, 05, and 99. API routes validated for 01, 02, 04, and 06. API responses route back through 99. The v3.6 workflow has been published to fix prompt_content evaluation. Objective: clean relay mailbox index state without deleting relay records. Scope: inspect relay/index/*.json, identify pending entries that are test artifacts or already handled, and prepare cleanup plan for removing handled/test relay filenames from pending lists. Do not delete relay/inbox or relay/outbox files. Do not change routing logic. Do not modify archive marker behavior. Output: list of index files needing cleanup, filenames proposed for removal from pending, any uncertainty or items that should remain pending. No execution unless separately authorized.
